assembly_context.name: FourAxisIndustrialArm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 创建一个工业风四轴机械臂装配体，包含底座、回转台、3个通用关节叉、2个通用连杆、3个销轴和1个夹爪。所有零件基于默认尺寸参数化建模，并通过同轴和重合配合进行装配。初始姿态为竖直向上伸展（修正：为避免奇异点，肩关节设为90度水平伸出，其余关节伸直）。
design_rules: Unit: mm for dimensions, convert to m for API calls if necessary.
Fillet R2 on all exposed sharp edges.
Clearance fit: Pin D18mm into Hole D20mm.

instances.name: Shoulder Joint Fork
instances.placement_notes: Mounted on Yaw Turntable. Initial angle 90 deg (horizontal) to avoid singularity.

instances.name: Elbow Joint Fork
instances.placement_notes: Mounted on Upper Arm Link end via pin. Initial angle 0 deg (straight relative to Link1).

instances.name: Wrist Joint Fork
instances.placement_notes: Mounted on Forearm Link end via pin. Initial angle 0 deg.

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_yaw_turntable to inst_base_plate (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_joint_fork_shoulder to inst_yaw_turntable (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_hollow_link_1 to inst_joint_fork_shoulder (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_elbow to inst_hollow_link_1 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_hollow_link_2 to inst_joint_fork_elbow (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_wrist to inst_hollow_link_2 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_simple_gripper to inst_joint_fork_wrist (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)

part.name: Joint Fork
part.function: Connects links via hinge pins, provides rotational joints
part.shape: U-shaped fork with two ears. Gap 40mm. Ear thickness 10mm. Hinge hole diameter 20mm.
part.material_or_notes: Aluminum Alloy. Fillet R2 on external edges. Chamfer C1 on mating faces.

faces.name: bottom_face
faces.purpose: Mates with previous stage flat surface (Turntable only for Shoulder; Links use pin connection)

axes.name: mount_axis_z
axes.purpose: Vertical axis for mounting to Turntable (Shoulder only)

assembly_relation_notes: Shoulder: Bottom mates with Turntable Top (Flange style). Mount Axis Z aligns with Turntable Z.
Elbow/Wrist: Connected via Hinge Pin only. No face contact with Link ends.
Hinge Axis aligns with Link Start/End Axis.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch U-shape profile on XZ plane.
Extrude along Y to create width (60mm total, 40mm gap).
Add weight reduction holes (D10) in ears.
